name: Marinated Vegetable Toss
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables in a salad bowl.
2. Pour Dietitian's Italian dressing over the vegetables.
3. Refrigerate overnight.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 Vegetable Exchange (20 calories excluding dressing)
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little (1985)
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'brion and her Meal-Master
